headline: Get Paid 14% To Wait For KEYS Stock To Go On Sale
summary: Here is a way to get paid a healthy income stream from Keysight Technologies now, which you keep no matter what, while setting a price well below today's level, where you would be happy to become an owner.

headline: 3 Robotics Stocks in the M&A Spotlight in 2026
summary: Robotics and industrial automation are in a classic consolidation cycle. Hyperscalers are pushing into physical AI, automakers need autonomy stacks they lack time to build, and semicap buyers want exposure to AI accelerators.
